top_signals.title: India’s Youngest Airline Seeks Funds as Iran War Drives Up Costs
top_signals.summary: Akasa Air is looking to raise 10.5 billion rupees ($110 million) through equity and debt, people familiar with the matter said, as India’s youngest airline seeks funds to overcome challenges brought on by the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dubai plans new port to bypass Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Project to build capacity on UAE’s east coast represents a major shift after US-Iran war
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Airline Shares Face More Profit Pain as Demand Stays Weak
top_signals.summary: Shares of China’s major airlines are lagging Cathay Pacific Airways Ltd. by nearly 50 percentage points this year, as analysts expect weaker profits to persist on lackluster domestic travel demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Europe’s digital euro: What it is and how it would work
top_signals.summary: The negotiations on rules for a digital euro aim to produce a final law by the end of the year and have it launch in 2029.

top_signals.title: French star says only superstars can win stages in current era of Tour de France
top_signals.summary: Four-time champion Tadej Pogacar won two of the opening nine stages, as did Belgian Tim Merlier, the world's best sprinter.

top_signals.title: Libra-Plast to Provide Doors, Hatches for Damen Naval PES Project
top_signals.summary: Damen Naval has signed a procurement contract with Libra-Plast AS in Norway for the delivery of all watertight, weathertight and gastight doors and hatches for the PES project. Under this project, a Damen SIGMA frigate will be built by COTECAR…

top_signals.title: UK P&I Club, TT Club Offer to Acquire Thomas Miller Holdings
top_signals.summary: UK P&I Club and TT Club have announced their joint offer to acquire Thomas Miller Holdings has received shareholder support, with acceptances in excess of 89%.The acquisition offer was made to shareholders on June 18, 2026 by TMH Bidco, a special…
